---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a user-visible capability or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["kind/feature"]
---

## Summary

Describe the requested feature.

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Outcome

Describe the desired end state without prescribing the full implementation.

## Acceptance Signals

- What would make this feel complete?
- What should reviewers be able to verify?

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or prior discussion if useful.
